title: Dark Redstone
description: Turns off redstone lighting to make large builds more optimized
body:
**This mod was made on commission**

This mod disables lighting that comes from active redstone, repeaters,  comparators, and redstone torches so large redstone builds do not have to run nearly as many light calculations.


Here is the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/FZHXFYp8fc) for my mods
